mapper.update: update writing_question set task_type = #{taskType}, title = #{title}, description = #{description}, image_url = #{imageUrl}, image_object_key = #{imageObjectKey} where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select id, task_type, title, description, image_url, image_object_key, is_deleted, deleted_time, created_time from writing_question where is_deleted = 0 order by id desc
select id, task_type, title, description, image_url, image_object_key, is_deleted, deleted_time, created_time from writing_question where id = #{id} and is_deleted = 0
mapper.update: update writing_question set is_deleted = 1, deleted_time = #{deletedTime} where id = #{id} and is_deleted = 0
update writing_question set is_deleted = 0, deleted_time = null where id = #{id} and is_deleted = 1
